title: Employee Role Management
removeConfirm: Remove role for {{name}}? They will lose access to this CC role.
deptMappingDesc: Employees are automatically assigned a CC role based on their PR department. Manage the department-to-role mappings below.
deptRemoveConfirm: Remove auto-mapping for '{{key}}'? Employees in this department will default to 'generic'.
deptUnmappedDesc: These departments exist in the PR system but have no CC role mapping. Click one to pre-fill the form.
